text:
Blazen is a ninja who was enlisted by the President into stopping a threat.

The original Blazen presumably became a Cronenberg in the Cronenberged Dimension.

Blazen is first shown to be meditating on a plane full of US Marines. Both Rick and Morty are impressed with him and bet that he will survive the longest and admire him. Their belief was solidified when he survived the crash into the forest. When Morty finds Sticky, Blazen states that he knows what is happening, before revealing that he was joking and that what was happening was totally random. Blazen then leads Rick and Morty into a cave that contains semen before coming face to face with monster sperm. He then unsheathes his sword but gets it stuck in the cave roof. He attempts to jump for the sword but his pants fall off revealing that he is wearing his wife's thong. The sword dislodges from the cave roof impaling Blazen. His dying wish is to tell his wife that he wasn't wearing her thong and attempts to have sex with himself before he is devoured by the monster sperm. Morty later meets the widow and she calls him a creep for stealing them.
